text:
ホウホウホウ！
ワシはベネファン。しがない老人じゃ。

今日は、日々精進しているアークス諸君に、
プレゼントを贈りたいと思ってのう。
じゃが、実力のない者には渡せん！

その力を、ワシに見せて、
満足させ

Ho ho ho!
Me? Oh, I'm just a little old man named Benefan.

Lately I've been thinking about how I sure would like to show my appreciation to all
you hard-working ARKS defenders.
A little present, if you will. But not just for anyone!
First, you'll have to show me that you've got the right stuff!
